nasb.text: And he measured the width of the gateway, ten cubits, and the length of the gate, thirteen cubits.

esv.text: Then he measured the width of the opening of the gateway, ten cubits; and the length of the gateway, thirteen cubits.

cnv.text: 他量了東門，入口寬五公尺，通道寬六公尺半。

ccb.text: 通道尽头有一道门廊，宽五米，长六点五米。
